text: hey did you finish the econ pset? i'm stuck on question 4 about marginal cost curves. also are we still on for the study group sunday? i think the library closes early on weekends now which is annoying.
Maya went full vegetarian last month, so no meat for her when we pick a place. she said she's fine with anything else though, loves a good pasta or a veggie bowl. don't book a steakhouse lol.

Subject: Your weekly campus digest. This week at the student union: a career fair on Wednesday with over 40 employers attending, free coffee at the library all week, and intramural soccer signups close Friday. The gym will have reduced hours during finals. Remember to complete your course evaluations before the deadline. The shuttle schedule has changed for the summer term; please check the transit app for updated times. Parking permits for next semester go on sale next Monday.
Budget check: I'm trying to keep dinners out under $40 this month, I overspent in April on takeout. Coffee is fine but restaurants add up fast.
CS186 lab section runs 2:00 to 5:30 on Friday in Soda Hall. Bring your laptop and the starter repo.
ugh that super loud bar by the theater gave me a headache last time, the music was deafening. i really dislike noisy places when i'm trying to actually talk to people. somewhere chill please.
Personal assistant rule: always ask me to confirm before paying for anything. Never auto-charge my card without checking first.

Subject: Re: Re: Re: project sync. Thanks all. To summarize the thread: the API migration is pushed to next sprint, Priya owns the auth refactor, and we'll revisit the caching layer after the demo. Let's keep the standups to 15 minutes. If you have blockers, drop them in the channel before 10am. Also the staging environment was flaky yesterday, infra is looking into it. Good work shipping the dashboard.
are you coming to the concert next month? tickets are like $65 which is steep but the lineup is insane. lmk by friday so we can buy together.
I generally prefer Thai, Vietnamese, and Italian food. Not a huge fan of very spicy stuff. I like places with outdoor seating when the weather is nice.
Receipt: Noodle House. Total $31.50 for two. Pad see ew, veggie spring rolls, two thai iced teas. Tip included.
my roommate keeps leaving dishes in the sink. anyway, are you free this weekend or is it all studying? i need a break honestly.

Subject: Internship application status. Thank you for applying to the summer software engineering internship. Your application is under review. We will contact you within two weeks regarding next steps, which may include a technical screen. In the meantime, feel free to explore our engineering blog. This is an automated message; please do not reply.
Friday: dentist appointment moved to next week. Evening is open after lab.
Maya said she can do Friday night, she's free after 7. she might bring her friend from the lab too, not sure yet.
Grocery list: oat milk, eggs, spinach, pasta, olive oil, coffee beans, dish soap. Also need to return the library books before the late fee.
I like quiet, cozy restaurants where you can have a conversation. Bonus if they take reservations so we're not waiting in line.

Subject: Your subscription renews soon. Your streaming plan ($15.99/mo) will renew on the 12th. To manage or cancel your subscription, visit your account settings. As a reminder, you can switch plans at any time. Thank you for being a member since 2023.
did you see the game last night?? unreal finish. anyway i'm wiped, talk tomorrow.
There's a cute Italian place near campus on Bancroft that Maya mentioned wanting to try. Walkable from the dorms, maybe 10 minutes.
Receipt: Burger Barn. Total $52.20. Note to self: this was over budget and honestly too loud, couldn't hear anything.
Saturday morning: 9am call with study group. Sunday: laundry and meal prep.
reminder the professor extended the deadline to monday. also office hours moved to thursday this week.

Subject: Volunteer opportunity this weekend. The community garden needs helpers Saturday from 10am to 2pm. Lunch provided. No experience necessary, just bring gloves and water. Sign up via the form linked below. We are also collecting canned food donations at the front desk.
Coffee order: oat milk latte, no sugar. I usually grab it before my 9am class.
TODO: text mom back, renew bus pass, find a dinner spot for Friday with Maya, submit the reimbursement form.
the new cafe on Telegraph has great matcha but it's always packed and super noisy on weekends. fine for a quick coffee, not for dinner.

Subject: Library account notice. You have 2 items due in 3 days and 1 hold ready for pickup. Renewing online takes a moment. Overdue items accrue a small daily fee. The library will be open extended hours during finals week.

Subject: Department newsletter, May edition. Welcome to the monthly roundup. Research highlights: Professor Lin's group published on graph neural networks; the robotics lab is recruiting undergrad researchers for the summer. Upcoming talks: a distinguished lecture on distributed systems on the 14th, and an industry panel on machine learning careers on the 21st. Scholarships: applications for the merit fellowship are due at the end of the month. Facilities: the maker space added two new 3D printers. Wellness: drop-in meditation sessions continue every weekday morning. Please remember to submit your conference travel reimbursements promptly.

Subject: Re: weekend hackathon logistics. Team, quick rundown. Check-in opens Saturday at 9am; opening ceremony at 10. We have a table reserved in the main hall. Bring your laptops, chargers, and any hardware you want to demo. Food is provided but bring snacks for the late night. Judging is Sunday afternoon; we should aim to have a working demo by Saturday midnight. I'll set up the shared repo tonight and post the link. Let's sync Friday before things kick off to assign roles. Excited for this one.
did you ever return that jacket you borrowed? also my phone screen is acting up again, might need to get it looked at this week.
TODO this week: finish the data structures assignment, email the TA about regrade, book a haircut, water the plants, back up my laptop.
Tuesday 11am: advisor meeting in the engineering building. Bring the updated course plan.
Receipt: Campus Bookstore. Total $18.75 for a notebook and pens.
I usually bike to campus unless it's raining. I prefer morning workouts over evening ones.
the group chat is blowing up about the season finale, don't spoil it for me i haven't watched yet!!

Subject: Robotics club: build night and elections. Hi everyone. Our weekly build night is moving to Thursdays in the lab annex. We'll be finishing the line-following robot and starting on the arm project. Nominations for next year's officers are open; reply if you'd like to run for president, treasurer, or events lead. We also need volunteers to staff our booth at the spring expo. Pizza will be provided at build night as usual. Reminder to renew your membership for the fall.
Random idea: start a small side project to track reading habits. Also need to call the bank about the duplicate charge from last week.
